phases.title: Source bucket inventory captured
blockingIssues: Production source bucket inventory has not been captured.
nextActions: Run production-minio-source-inventory against the source endpoint and attach sanitized inventory evidence.

phases.title: Target bucket inventory captured
blockingIssues: Production target bucket inventory has not been captured.
nextActions: Run production-minio-target-inventory against the target endpoint and attach sanitized inventory evidence.

phases.title: Source and target object inventories reconciled
blockingIssues: Source and target object inventory comparison has not passed.
nextActions: Run production-minio-compare and attach object-inventory-comparison JSON/TSV evidence.

phases.title: Migration dry-run completed
blockingIssues: MinIO migration dry-run evidence is missing.
nextActions: Run a non-destructive or rehearsal migration dry-run, record commands without secrets, and prove resumability.

phases.title: Sample downloads verified
blockingIssues: Post-migration sample download verification is missing.
nextActions: Verify sampled files can be downloaded from target storage and compare size/hash without recording object contents.

phases.title: Post-migration runtime smoke passed
blockingIssues: Post-migration MinIO runtime smoke has not passed.
nextActions: Run smoke-minio-runtime against the target or rehearsal environment and attach sanitized report evidence.

phases.title: Rollback or source-read fallback linked
blockingIssues: MinIO rollback or source-read fallback evidence is missing.
nextActions: Attach rollback rehearsal, source-read fallback or double-write evidence and cross-link production rollback evidence.

openIssues.description: This example is only a template and cannot be used as production READY evidence.
openIssues.nextAction: Create a real evidence file outside git and run the strict-ready validator.
